message:
fix(frankenterm-web): use full cell dimensions for procedural glyph rasterization

Remove the 2-pixel shrink (.saturating_sub(2).max(1)) on glyph_w/glyph_h
when rasterizing procedural fallback glyphs. The procedural raster must
match the per-cell quad size exactly, otherwise UV mapping stretches the
glyph within the cell. Pass cell_w and cell_h directly to
rasterize_procedural_glyph() instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
